WOSAI_OmniSlider.description: Multi-channel slider control, supports float/int/fill style

WOSAI_SizeSelect.description: Preset/custom dual-mode resolution selector, auto 8x alignment

scale_method.name: Scale Method
scale_method.tooltip: Center Crop=crop to target ratio / Proportional=scale by multiplier

scale_multiplier.name: Scale Multiplier
scale_multiplier.tooltip: Effective in proportional mode, based on original dimensions

image.name: image
image.tooltip: Input image (optional, will be resized to target)

mask.name: mask
mask.tooltip: Input mask (optional, will be resized with image)

latent.name: latent
latent.tooltip: Input latent (optional, will be resized to target)

vae.name: vae
vae.tooltip: VAE model (optional, image will be encoded to latent via VAE)

WOSAI_CanvasNote.description: Editable canvas annotation node, supports Markdown/gradient/presets
